title: Lead SEO Specialist at Dove India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at Dove India South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Dove India South Asia Partners! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Delhi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Dove India South Asia Partners:
Dove India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dove India South Asia Partners!
